Metadata.title: Talking Text
Metadata.description: Talking Text - A spoken English practice app for children, where AI only chats within what the child has learned.

Auth.server_error: Server error, please try again later

errors.AUTH_SERVER_ERROR: Server error, please try again later

Parent.welcome_desc: Manage children, learning materials, and progress here.

Learners.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete?
Learners.no_children_hint: No children yet, please add one.

Chat.title: Chat
Chat.welcome: Hello, {name}! Ready to start learning today?
Chat.no_chat: Tap the button below to start speaking.
Chat.no_sessions_yet: No practice yet — start your first chat with Tina!
Chat.no_learners_desc: Please add a child in the parent dashboard first, then start a conversation.
Chat.scope_free_practice: Free practice — calibrating Tina to your level
Chat.text_placeholder: Type a message, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
Chat.session_soft_limit_text: Great practice today! Want to start a new topic?
Chat.session_hard_limit_text: This conversation has reached its maximum length. Please start a new one to continue.
Chat.onboarding_welcome: Hi {name}! I'm Tina, your AI English coach. Let's practice English together today! You can capture/record to import a textbook, or select an existing one. Otherwise, we can start in free practice mode!
Chat.onboarding_free_practice_hint: Type or speak in the box below to start practicing freely ✨

errors.CHAT_AUDIO_EMPTY: No audio captured. Please try again.
errors.CHAT_LEARNER_NOT_FOUND: Child not found. Please refresh and try again.
errors.CHAT_EMPTY_TRANSCRIPTION: Couldn't catch that — please say it again.
errors.CHAT_MIC_DENIED: Microphone access denied. Check your browser permissions.
errors.CHAT_TURN_FAILED: Chat failed. Please try again later.
errors.CHAT_SESSION_HARD_LIMIT: Conversation reached its limit. Please start a new one.

Materials.title: Materials
Materials.subtitle: All learning materials added to this account. Archive to hide from the scope picker without losing mastery history; delete to remove permanently.
Materials.detail_subtitle: Manage and edit language items and parent-child hierarchy for this material.
Materials.empty_state: No materials yet — open chat and tap the camera to add one.
Materials.confirm_delete: Delete "{name}"? Mastery history for its items is preserved, but the group itself cannot be recovered.
Materials.banner_subtitle: Snap a photo, speak, or type — AI extracts the words, phrases, and patterns. Organize them into textbooks later in the Organize workbench.
Materials.capture_section_hint: Practice right away — no need to file into a textbook first; organize later when it is worth keeping.
Materials.tree_empty_hint: Capture material with smart capture first, then file it into a textbook tag tree in the Organize workbench.
Materials.confirm_large_scope:
This level of the textbook contains a lot of items ({count} in total).
For the best practice experience, the AI teacher will prioritize up to {cap} items your child has not mastered yet.
You can also pick a specific unit or lesson for focused practice.

Continue?

MaterialPickers.kind_placeholder: e.g. Textbook, Unit, Summer camp listening…
MaterialPickers.parent_hint: AI auto-picks the closest existing material as parent; you can search to change it, or create a new one inline.
MaterialPickers.parent_search_placeholder: Search existing or type a new name…
MaterialPickers.parent_no_groups_yet: No materials yet. Type a name to create one as the parent.

Onboarding.title: Add your first child
Onboarding.subtitle: We'll use this to tune Tina's tone and difficulty.
Onboarding.cefr_hint: Pick a CEFR band, or skip — Tina will figure it out from the first chat.
Onboarding.persona_note: You can customize Tina's name and voice later in settings.

errors.ONBOARDING_CREATE_FAILED: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Scope.title: Choose practice scope
Scope.free_practice_hint: Chat without a fixed vocab list
Scope.no_groups_yet: No materials yet — tap the camera to add one
Scope.apply_failed: Couldn't switch scope. Please try again.

Ingest.error_mic_denied: Microphone access denied. Check your browser permissions.
Ingest.error_audio_empty: No audio captured. Please try again.
Ingest.error_transcribe_failed: Couldn't transcribe. Try again or type the description.
Ingest.description_placeholder: e.g. Today we learned the colors and clothing words. (Supports Cmd+V to paste copied images directly)
Ingest.section_empty: Nothing here yet — tap Add to enter one manually.
Ingest.low_confidence_hint: {count} item(s) the AI was unsure about — tap Review to inspect them.
Ingest.error_no_input: Add an image or describe what to learn.
Ingest.error_no_items: No language items found. Try a clearer photo.
Ingest.error_save_failed: Couldn't save the group. Please try again.
Ingest.error_scope_failed: Saved, but couldn't switch the chat scope.
Ingest.warning_limit_reached: You can upload up to 5 photos at a time.
Ingest.warning_size_reached: The single or cumulative image size cannot exceed 10MB.
Ingest.parent_note_badge: Separated from the content by AI
Ingest.parent_note_placeholder: Your notes, requests, or remarks about this material (any language). E.g. "Unit 3 vocab, focus on the r sound." Used only to guide the AI teacher — never treated as learning content.
Ingest.raw_text_placeholder: Fix OCR mistakes in the raw text the vision model extracted...
